title: Enhanced Weather!
description: This is a weather mod-pack with weather mods and enhancements along with some performance mods and more.
body:
Command the storm. Face the fury. No shaders needed.

Enhanced Weather is a natural disaster modpack built for players who want powerful, realistic storms without the FPS hit of shaders.

💨 Core Features:

ProtoManly’s Weather — raymarched tornadoes, supercells, epic storms

EAS Addon — storm sirens, transmitters, authentic warnings

Performance-first stack: Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore, Krypton — buttery smooth even during chaos

Enhanced fog + dynamic lights — better atmosphere without shaders

Clean + expandable — no clutter, just storms + smooth gameplay

🎯 Built for: Survival worlds, storm chasers, builders who want extreme weather without extra lag or shader setup.

⚡ Works great on vanilla lighting + default textures.

No shaders. No fluff. Just storms.

🌪️ Recommended: Add your favorite minimap or survival mods — Enhanced Weather plays nice with most!

suport creators:
